mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.code, r.description, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_deleted FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.code = #{permissionCode}
